title: Vision and Mission
author: JSL EKOS
description: This module explains the vision, mission, and core values that guide Jindal Stainless Limited in achieving business excellence, innovation, sustainability, and customer satisfaction.
learningObjectives: Learn how the vision and mission influence daily operations.
Understand the importance of sustainability and innovation.

content.introduction: Every successful organization operates with a clear vision and mission. They define the company's purpose, future direction, and the values that guide every employee's decisions.
content.vision: To be a globally admired organization recognized for leadership in stainless steel, innovation, sustainability, customer satisfaction, and operational excellence.
content.mission: To manufacture world-class stainless steel products through continuous improvement, advanced technology, responsible business practices, employee development, and customer-focused solutions.
employeeRole: Follow company values in daily work.
content.summary: The vision and mission of JSL guide every business decision and encourage employees to deliver safe, sustainable, innovative, and customer-focused solutions.
